sections.heading: GovSecure AI Policy Suite
paragraphs: Single-offering package of core policies, supporting standards, forms, questionnaire, registry, and charter
Document Code: GS-AIPS-GUIDE-01
For internal operational use and paid client delivery. Customization remains the responsibility of the adopting organization.

sections.heading: What is included
paragraphs: This package combines the core policy layer already completed with the operational artifacts needed to turn policy into day-to-day governance. It is designed as a paid SMB-friendly offering that can be adopted internally or delivered to clients as a practical AI governance starter set.
tables: Standalone licensed DOCX and matching PDF versions of the primary AI governance policies.
Operational documents that define logging, change control, transparency, and records/evidence expectations.
A branded form in DOCX and XLSX for requesting and screening new AI use cases.
The GovSecure Third-Party AI Privacy Risk Assessment in DOCX, PDF, and XLSX.
A standalone XLSX register to inventory approved AI systems, owners, vendors, and review status.
A charter defining governance authority, membership, cadence, and outputs.

sections.heading: Package structure
paragraphs: • 00_Overview — offering guide and usage notes
• 01_Core_Policies — licensed standalone policy documents in DOCX and PDF
• 02_Supporting_Standards_and_Procedures — four operational standards/procedures in DOCX and PDF
• 03_Forms_and_Registers — use-case intake form and system registry in editable formats
• 04_Questionnaires — third-party AI privacy vendor questionnaire and scoring workbook
• 05_Governance_Charter — executive AI governance charter in DOCX and PDF

sections.heading: Recommended deployment sequence
paragraphs: • Adopt or tailor the Executive AI Governance Charter and AI Governance Policy first so ownership is not left floating.
• Publish the Enterprise AI Acceptable Use Policy and AI Data Handling and Privacy Policy next so day-to-day use has guardrails.
• Stand up the AI Use-Case Intake Form, Third-Party AI Privacy Risk Assessment, and AI System Registry so approvals and inventory start immediately.
• Layer in the supporting standards and procedures for monitoring, changes, disclosure, and evidence retention once the initial intake and inventory process is running.

sections.heading: Licensing and use
paragraphs: • License scope: This document is licensed for internal business use by the purchasing organization and its controlled affiliates unless otherwise agreed in writing.
• Permitted use: The purchasing organization may adapt branding, terminology, roles, and implementation details to fit its operating model and legal environment.
• Restricted use: The document may not be resold, redistributed, sublicensed, or published externally as a standalone product without written authorization from GovSecure.
• Customization responsibility: The adopting organization remains responsible for tailoring the content to applicable law, sector obligations, contractual requirements, and risk appetite.
• No legal advice: Materials are provided as operational governance content and do not constitute legal advice, regulatory certification, or a guarantee of compliance.
• Warranty and liability: Materials are provided as-is for practical governance use. GovSecure disclaims implied warranties to the maximum extent permitted by law.
